query: what's the GCP equivalent of Azure Private Endpoint and AWS PrivateLink

metrics.content:
I’ll route this to the right network-desk specialist, then answer concisely.

**GCP equivalent:** **Private Service Connect (PSC)**.

| Cloud | Consumer-side private access | Provider-side private service exposure |
|---|---|---|
| Azure | Private Endpoint | Private Link Service |
| AWS | Interface VPC Endpoint | AWS PrivateLink endpoint service |
| GCP | Private Service Connect endpoint | Private Service Connect service attachment |

**Nuance:** For Google APIs specifically, GCP also has **Private Google Access**, but the closest architectural equivalent to Azure Private Endpoint and AWS PrivateLink is **Private Service Connect**.

> Analysis only — verify against vendor documentation before applying.
